# Rollout Checklist - <feature>

## Pre-deploy
- [ ] Spec updated
- [ ] Required ADR/RFC linked
- [ ] Migrations tested
- [ ] Tests green
- [ ] Runbook updated

## Deploy
- [ ] Deploy executed
- [ ] Health endpoints green
- [ ] Smoke tests passed
- [ ] Error rate normal

## Post-deploy
- [ ] Audit events validated
- [ ] Metrics/traces validated
- [ ] No contract regressions
